== Notes for [[Item:Q103382|Q103382]] ==

Not much is known about Dona Cimfa.

She was the wife of a Rabbi in Portugal - after his death she was involved in a 9 year legal battle to retain her dead husband's assets which had been confiscated by a belligerent Crown.

She was a tough woman in a hard time...

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000017720046695

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
